_comment: On-prem scripts read settings from the script itself (top section). This file documents the expected webhook payload fields.

webhookPayload_onboarding.fullName: string (optional, built from first+last if missing)
webhookPayload_onboarding.samAccountName: string (optional, derived from UPN if missing)
webhookPayload_onboarding.groups: array or comma-separated string (optional, defaults to script setting)
webhookPayload_onboarding.initialPassword: string (used only if autoGeneratePassword is false)
webhookPayload_onboarding.returnPassword: boolean (default: false) - include temp password in response
